  • Classes in com.abstratt.simon.metamodel.dsl used by com.abstratt.simon.examples
    Class
    Description
    Meta.Attribute
     
    Meta.Composite
     
    Meta.Contained
     
    Meta.Documentation
    Marks an attribute accessor as the one that holds documentation for instances of the enclosing type.
    Meta.Modifier
    Marks an Meta.Attribute as available as a modifier — settable via the [identifier] syntax in an object header.
    Meta.Name
     
    Meta.ObjectType
    ObjectTypes are the default classification, so usually do not need to be explicitly used.
    Meta.Package
     
    Meta.RecordType
    A record is an structured data type that can only hold primitives, enumeration values and other records.
    Meta.Reference
     
    Meta.Required
     
    Meta.Typed
